DIFC Order No. 1 of 2009 In respect of Parts 43 and 53 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts 2004

Article 1.heading: This Order shall be cited as ‘Order in Respect of Parts 43 and 53 of the Rules of DIFC Courts’

Article 2.heading: In this Order, unless the context otherwise requires:

Article 3.heading: This Order shall be interpreted in accordance with the interpretative provisions set out at paragraphs 1 and 2 of the Schedule to and all defi ned terms, unlessthe Law (/glossary/the-law/) otherwise indicated, shall bear the same meanings as set out under paragraph 3 of the Schedule to the Law

Article 4.heading: Upon the recommendation of the Chief Justice pursuant to Article 31 of the Law, the following new Parts of the Rules of the DIFC Courts shall be enacted to supplement those issued pursuant to DIFC Order No.1 of 2007:

Article 5.heading: From the Commencement Date all proceedings before the DIFC Courts must be commenced in accordance with the Rules of the DIFC Courts, which shall incorporate the appended Part 43 (/DIFC-courts/rules/part-43) and Part 53 (/DIFC-courts/rules/part-53)

Article 6.heading: This Order shall come into force on the Commencement Date
